body:
## Summary
- Switch `CountdownBanner` from a rules-only countdown to the shared citizenship timeline phase helper.
- Keep the Home banner visible after 2026-06-06 with localized civic-test phase copy until the first sitting window has passed.
- Add focused validator summary coverage for the first-sitting date, phase cases, Home mount, and focus registry keys.

## Validation
- `node --test tests/content-countdown-banner-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern 'countdown|citizenship timeline'`
- `node --test tests/content-countdown-banner-parity.test.js tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js --test-name-pattern 'countdown|citizenship timeline|focus registry|routing|selector'`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `npm run validate:content`
- `npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/countdown-banner-source-affordance.spec.ts --workers=1`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
title: [codex] Keep countdown banner through civic test phase
